untranslatable_reason: Measured Move Up requires multi-leg detection with precise retracement measurement (40-60% of first leg) and second leg amplitude matching. This pattern requires state tracking across multiple bars to identify: (1) initial upleg price move, (2) correction retracement percentage, (3) second upleg onset, and (4) second leg gain equivalence to first leg gain. Standard indicators cannot retrospectively measure historical leg amplitudes or track multi-phase state. A lookback window or pattern state machine is required.
